untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern detection (broadening formation with right-angled descending structure) and custom ratio calculation (pattern height / breakout price compared to median). Pattern recognition, trend line identification, and ratio-based thresholds cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators (RSI, MACD, moving averages, etc.). The core logic depends on: (1) identifying pattern geometry and trend lines, (2) calculating height-to-breakout ratio, (3) comparing to historical median. These require pattern-detection algorithms unavailable in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Used Donchian channels as a proxy for pattern breakout detection, but this does not capture the specific pattern geometry (broadening formation), height calculation relative to breakout price, or regime-dependent width/height optimization that the original signal requires. Manual pattern annotation or a pattern-detection module would be necessary for accurate implementation.
